title: Next.js Developer
responsibilities: build reusable frontend components; integrate REST and GraphQL APIs; improve page performance and accessibility
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in react, javascript, typescript, html, css. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: PixelCraft is hiring a middle next.js developer to support building responsive product interfaces and reusable UI components.
raw_text: Vacancy V009: Next.js Developer at PixelCraft. Location: Dnipro. Employment: contract. Required experience: 2.0 years. Required skills: react, javascript, typescript, html, css, next.js, graphql, jest, cypress. Optional skills: accessibility, performance optimization. Responsibilities: build reusable frontend components; integrate REST and GraphQL APIs; improve page performance and accessibility.
